401.description: Failed to validate ticket with SFU's CAS

502.description: Failed to validate ticket with SFU's CAS

get.description: Logs out the current user by invalidating the session_id cookie
Get info about the current user. Only accessible by that user
Returns a list of all election & their status

post.description: Creates an election and places it in the database. Returns election json on success

get.description:
Retrieves the election data for an election by name.
    Returns private details when the time is allowed.
    If user is an admin or election officer, returns computing ids for each candidate as well.

404.description: Election of that name doesn't exist

patch.description:
Updates an election in the database.

        Note that this doesn't let you change the name of an election, unless the new
        name produces the same slug.

        Returns election json on success.

delete.description: Deletes an election from the database. Returns whether the election exists after deletion.

401.description: Need to be logged in as an admin.

409.description: Election is still referenced by nominee applications.

get.description: get all candidates across all elections
get all the candidates of a single election

404.description: Election with slug does not exist

post.description: Register for a specific position in this election, but doesn't set a speech. Returns the created entry.

patch.description: update the application of a specific registrant and return the changed entry

delete.description: delete the registration of a person

post.description: Nominee info is always publically tied to election, so be careful!

get.description: Nominee info is always publically tied to election, so be careful!

409.description: Nominee is still referenced by election applications.

patch.description: Updates an exisint nominee. Returns an updated copy of their nominee info.

get.description: Get information about the current officers. With no authorization, only get basic info.
Information for all execs from all exec terms

Get term info for an executive. All term info is public for all past or active terms.
        Future terms can only be accessed by website admins.

schema.title: Response Get Officer Terms By Id

403.description: not authorized to view private info

get.description: Get officer info for the current user, if they've ever been an exec. Only admins can get info about another user.

403.description: not authorized to view author user info

patch.description:
After election, officer computing ids are input into our system.
        If you have been elected as a new officer, you may authenticate with SFU CAS,
        then input your information & the valid token for us. Admins may update this info.

post.description:
Only the sysadmin, president, or DoA can submit this request. It will usually be the DoA.
        Updates the system with a new officer, and enables the user to login to the system to input their information.

patch.description: Update the information for an Officer's term

delete.description: Remove the specified officer term. Only website admins can run this endpoint. BE CAREFUL WITH THIS!

get.description: checks if the current user has the admin permission
Get events that start OR end in this year

schema.title: Response Get Events For This Year

get.summary: Get Events For This Year Month
get.description: Get events that start OR end in the given year and month

schema.title: Response Get Events For This Year Month

get.description: Get the realtime TransLink bus status.
Get the static TransLink departure schedule.

200.description: The static departure schedule for the buses at the upper bus loop.

get.description: Get the departure schedule with bus status. Attempts to use the cached static schedule first.

200.description: The next three depature times with bus status information.

OfficerTermUpdate.title: OfficerTermUpdate
OfficerTermUpdate.description: Request body to patch an Officer Term

last_logged_in.title: Last Logged In
last_logged_in.description: Time the user last logged in

scheduled_departure_time.title: Scheduled Departure Time
scheduled_departure_time.description: Unix timestamp for the scheduled departure time, in seconds.

realtime_time.title: Realtime Time
realtime_time.description: Unix timestamp for the buses actual arrival time, in seconds.

delay_seconds.title: Delay Seconds
delay_seconds.description: How delayed the bus is, in seconds. Positive numbers indicate the bus is late, negative is early.

scheduled_departure_time.title: Scheduled Departure Time
scheduled_departure_time.description: Unix timestamp for the scheduled departure time, in seconds.

realtime_time.title: Realtime Time
realtime_time.description: Unix timestamp for the buses actual arrival time, in seconds.

delay_seconds.title: Delay Seconds
delay_seconds.description: How delayed the bus is, in seconds. Positive numbers indicate the bus is late, negative is early.

status.description: Enum that indicates if the bus has arrived (1), is delayed (2), is on time (3), or cancelled (4).

date_fetched.title: Date Fetched
date_fetched.description: The date derived from the app's TZ_INFO (most likely America/Vancouver)

schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.description: The static departure schedule for the buses at the upper bus loop.

trip_id.title: Trip Id
trip_id.description: The GTFS Trip ID for this bus.

route_id.title: Route Id
route_id.description: The GTFS Route ID for this bus.

departure_seconds.title: Departure Seconds
departure_seconds.description: The number of seconds after midnight for this departure.

departure_time.title: Departure Time
departure_time.description: Time that the bus is departing as a HH:MM:SS string.
